tasks.title: Add Settings
tasks.description: Add settings icon that allows the user to change font, change language, and set theme, dark mode; light mode

tasks.title: Add Task Type
tasks.description: Add a type, Housework, Homework, Work, Personal, Other

tasks.title: Add an Edit
tasks.description:
Add the ability to edit a task
-add a pencil next to the delete icon
-pops Edit Task modal
-Success toast message when edit is successful
-Changes save without refreshing

tasks.title: Add Autofocus
tasks.description: Add autofocus when opening the new task modal

tasks.title: Add Select All For Completion
tasks.description: Add A Mark As Complete option alongside the Delete

tasks.title: Remove Special Characters from Task Title
tasks.description: Prevent the user from using special characters in the task title, allowed in the description

tasks.title: Delete Confirmation
tasks.description: Create a delete confirmation so the user can confirm/deny deleting a task

tasks.title: Add Filters
tasks.description: Add date filter, priority filter, type filter

tasks.title: Fix Modal Exiting On Click
tasks.description: Modal is exiting when clicking in the modal, add .stopPropagation()

tasks.title: Add Success Toast Messages
tasks.description: Use prime.ng toast messages on successful add, deletion

tasks.title: Add Selection on task
tasks.description: Remove the selector bubble, allow user to select anywhere in the card

tasks.title: Add drag and drop to reorder tasks
tasks.description: Add the ability to drag and drop tasks

tasks.title: Fix Clicking outside modal
tasks.description: Fix clicking outside of modal to exit, force user to hit cancel or the X

tasks.title: Delete Completed Task
tasks.description: Force user to mark the completed task as incomplete before deleting, send red toast message that states "ERROR: Mark task as incomplete before deleting" pop message when user hits the delete can, or if a multi selection has a complete task within it

tasks.title: Add Show/Hide Completed Tasks in All Tasks
tasks.description: Add a toggle that shows/hides completed tasks in All Tasks

tasks.title: Backend
tasks.description: Add ASP.NET backend, implement security, allow users to have their own tasks

tasks.title: Fix Modal Shrink
tasks.description: User can shrink description box too much
